name: openviking-copilot
description: Long-term semantic memory for GitHub Copilot Chat, powered by OpenViking.

commands.name: recall
commands.description: Search OpenViking memory and inspect the recalled context block

commands.name: store
commands.description: Append the message body as a stored memory and force an archive

commands.name: forget
commands.description: Delete a viking:// URI from OpenViking (irreversible)

openviking.url.markdownDescription: OpenViking server base URL (e.g. `https://your-openviking.example.com`). Leave empty to use `~/.openviking/ovcli.conf` or the local default `http://127.0.0.1:1933`.

openviking.apiKey.markdownDescription: Bearer token for the OpenViking server. **Prefer the `OpenViking: Set API Key` command** (writes to VS Code SecretStorage) over inline values here.

openviking.agentId.markdownDescription: Agent identity header (`X-OpenViking-Agent`). Defaults to `copilot-vscode` when empty.

openviking.autoRecall.markdownDescription: Inject relevant OpenViking memories at the top of each user turn.

openviking.autoCapture.markdownDescription: Capture chat turns into OpenViking after each response.

scripts.package: npm run build && vsce package --out openviking-copilot.vsix --no-dependencies
